title: Minimal integration test harness
acceptance_criteria: src/test/integration/setup.ts: exports setupTestDb() that connects to DATABASE_URL env var (expected to point at a test database, not the dev database); calls runMigrations(); exports teardownTestDb() that truncates all application tables (NOT schema_migrations); exports getTestPool() for query access

Integration tests use DATABASE_URL=postgresql://trading:trading@localhost:5432/trading_test (separate DB from dev); README or comment documents that the test DB must be created manually or via a setup script

src/test/integration/fixtures.ts: exports factory functions createPersonalityConfig(overrides?) and createPaperTrade(personalityId, overrides?) that insert rows into the test DB and return the inserted row

migration.test.ts tests: (1) running migrations from scratch creates all expected tables and hypertables — query information_schema.tables; (2) running migrations twice produces the same DB state — no duplicate rows in schema_migrations, no errors; (3) straddle_1min continuous aggregate exists and is queryable

redis-stream.test.ts tests: streamPublish to market.ticks followed by streamConsume in a consumer group delivers the message and calls the handler; ACK is confirmed via XPENDING returning 0 after handler runs; recoverPending on a message that was not ACKed returns that message ID
All integration tests use beforeAll(setupTestDb) and afterAll(teardownTestDb); each test clears relevant tables in beforeEach
Integration tests are in the 'integration' vitest project and do NOT run with bun test:unit
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
